name: american-kingpin
description: Nick Bilton's 'American Kingpin: The Epic Hunt for the Criminal Mastermind Behind the Silk Road' — the true story of Ross Ulbricht, his creation of the Silk Road dark web marketplace, and the federal investigation that brought him down.
useCase: Understand the rise and fall of the Silk Road, the dark web's most infamous marketplace, and the cat-and-mouse game between its creator and federal investigators.
knownRisks: Graphic descriptions of drug use and violence
Bilton's narrative style prioritizes drama over complete accuracy in some details
The book has been criticized by Ulbricht's supporters for bias
Contains details about illegal activities — informational purposes only
